metadata.description: STOYC Realtor OS — a productized Claude plugin suite for real estate agents.

plugins.name: core
plugins.description: Run your day and your database: morning briefings (on-demand or automatic), who-to-call lists, lead replies and follow-ups in your voice, database reactivation, appointment prep, contact research, call recaps, open-house capture, and live dashboards. Includes guided onboarding, voice personalization, and a memory that learns your preferences.

plugins.name: marketing
plugins.description: Turn a listing into a full marketing rollout with one command; create social posts, newsletters, blogs, and ads in your voice; plan a content calendar; manage your Google Business Profile and reviews; and audit your website for Google and AI-search ranking. Everything sounds like you.

plugins.name: listings
plugins.description: CMAs, market reports, property and neighborhood research, and buyer-match — researched live from the web with cited, verify-before-client guardrails. No MLS required.

plugins.name: prospecting
plugins.description: Sphere Radar watches the people you know for the life and money moments that come right before a move — a company sale, a new role in another city, a promotion, a new baby, an award — verifies them from news and public LinkedIn, and hands you a prioritized list with a warm, no-ask note ready to send in your voice. Be the agent who reaches out first. Runs on demand or every week on autopilot.
